channel.title: Conductor on My learning and diary
channel.description: Recent content in Conductor on My learning and diary

item.title: Fault-Oblivious Stateful Workflows: Durable Execution Matters More Than Orchestration
item.description: Introduction Last year, I spent some time studying Oracle Banking Microservices Architecture (OBMA), together with enterprise schedulers and orchestration platforms such as Control-M . Part of the work involved understanding how to convert traditional Control-M jobs into Airflow DAGs. During this process, I started to observe an important architectural distinction: Not all workflows are the same. While studying OBMA, I noticed that Netflix Conductor was used as the workflow engine inside the architecture.
